name: 杰克逊民主
subject: history
domain_name: Period 4-5 扩张与内战 Expansion & Civil War (1800-1877)
curriculum_points:
Unit 6: Learning Objective B
Explain the causes and effects of the settlement of the West from 1877 to 1898.

KC-6.2.II
In hopes of achieving ideals of self-sufficiency and independence, migrants moved to both rural and boomtown areas of the West for opportunities, such as building the railroads, mining, farming, and ranching.

excerpts.text:

Explain the causes and effects of the settlement of the West from 1877 to 1898.

KC-6.2.II
In hopes of achieving ideals of self-sufficiency and independence, migrants moved to both rural and boomtown areas of the West for opportunities, such as building the railroads, mining, farming, and ranching.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「杰克逊民主」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：Unit 6: Learning Objective B
Explain the causes and effects of the settlement of the West from 1877 to 1898.

KC-6.2.II
…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。
